scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:admin: cd admin && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run web
scripts.dev:provider: cd provider && npm install && npm run web
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:provider"
